reason: Check the diff against required shared thinking and systematic same-category coverage.
Verify every Rust/IPC/TypeScript/persistence boundary and production consumer together.
Run the complete Rust backend quality checklist and common-gate regression checks.
Run all applicable cross-layer, generated-binding, frontend, and Rust checks.
Verify same-handle filesystem authority, budget-before-read/IPC, bounded errors, DB rollback, and secret-free logs.
Verify deterministic replacement tests, root-outside exclusion, and byte-exact root-internal round-trip without any content-sensitive filtering.
Verify poll/cancel capability redaction and all existing OAuth ownership contracts.
Verify field-owned lock-internal RMW and CAS rollback preserve concurrent settings changes.
Verify option A common-gate behavior remains unchanged and DeniedByCircuit is not introduced.
Audit the implementation against the user's recorded option A decision.
Verify real production writers preserve unrelated fields and CAS rollback does not overwrite concurrent updates.
Verify archive rewrites only self references and validates every active/archive manifest before commit.
Verify the shipped settings ownership code-spec template exactly matches the project contract.
Verify the shipped Trellis archive code-spec template exactly matches the project contract.
Verify the shipped Skill contract template hash matches the project contract.
Verify the shipped Image Gen contract template hash matches the project contract.
Verify the shipped OAuth contract template hash matches the project contract.
Verify the shipped cross-layer index hash and relative links match the project contract.
Check that every identified root-cause cluster has an executable regression and spec contract.
